title: Myrcia chytraculia
taxonomy: Myrcia chytraculia is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to South America and is a member of the Myrcia genus, which is commonly found in the tropical regions of the continent. The Myrcia genus is further classified under the family Myrtaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Within the Myrtaceae family, Myrcia chytraculia belongs to the order Myrtales. The classification of Myrcia chytraculia follows the botanical naming convention of Kingdom, Family, Order, Genus, and Species (KOFOS).
